cmd /c sc query type= service state= all
powershell -NoProfile -Command "Get-ChildItem -Path C:\Program Files -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 20 Name,Length,LastWriteTime"
powershell -NoProfile -Command "Get-ChildItem -Path C:\Program Files -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 50 Name,Length,LastWriteTime"
powershell -NoProfile -Command "Get-ChildItem -Path C:\Program Files -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 100 Name,Length,LastWriteTime"

powershell -NoProfile -Command "Get-ChildItem -Path C:\Program Files (x86) -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 100 Name,Length,LastWriteTime"
